title: Trim Patcher
description: Makes Armor Trims and Trim Materials from any mod work together seamlessly on all Armor items!
body:
Makes Armor Trims and Trim Materials from any mod work together seamlessly on all Armor items!

For modders/datapackers: Add your trim textures and new palettes to the armor trims atlas, and new palettes to the items(1.21.11+)/blocks(1.21.10-) atlas, much like you would in a regular datapack. Make sure the trim material name matches is the same as the shorthand name for the palette.

Trim Patcher will combine all Paletted Permutation sprite sources that use the default Trim Palette as its key, meaning no additional compat is necessary to make your Armor Trims/Trim Materials to work with other mods/datapacks.
Item models to display new Trim Material colors are generated automatically as well.
